title: Senior Software Engineer - Byju's International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Byju's International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Byju's International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
